calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; CRS: Beldon Yee, Bailiff: Louise Perotti,
Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioner, Laurie Blavin present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Laurie Blavin-Kakone.
Decree signed in open court.
